name: Play Safe
description: Gain 50% Critical Chance but lose 20% Critical Damage.

name: Lucky Foot
description: Gain 10 Luck. You can trash an extra item with your first Passive ability.

name: Defensive Maneuver
description: Whenever you attack, gain 1 temporary Armor.

name: First Aid
description: When entering an Event Area other than a Shrine Area, gain a healing potion.

name: Recycling
description: When trashing an item with your first Passive Ability, the item obtained will be of the same Category (for example, Headpiece) as the item trashed. You can trash an extra item with your first Passive Ability.

name: Weapon Infusion
description: When attacking, apply 2 Weakness or 2 Wound (chosen randomly).

name: Sneak Attack
description: Your first attack of the combat always critically strikes.

name: Apothecary
description: When trashing item with your first Passive Ability, the item obtained has increased chance of being a potion. You can trash an extra item with your first Passive ability.

name: Mana Leak
description: When attacking, deal 5 magic damage to a random enemy.

name: Armor Infusion
description: When an enemy attacks you, apply 3 Weak or 3 Poison to it (chosen randomly)

name: Quality Control
description: When trashing an item with your first Passive Ability, the item obtained will not be of inferior Rarity than the item trashed (except for Mythics). You can trash an extra item with your first Passive ability.

name: Surprise Factor
description: When entering a new Area, attack a random enemy without triggering combat.

name: Junk Artisan
description:
When trashing item with your first Passive Ability, the item obtained has a 50% chance of being upgraded.
You can trash an extra item with your first Passive ability.

name: Sadist
description: When you critically strike, gain 20 Rage.

name: Spreading Toxicity
description: When an enemy dies, its negative Statuses transfer to a random enemy.

name: Subterfuge
description: Enemies receive double damage when it's not your turn.

name: Perfected Defense
description: At the end of the round, lose 3 Armor and gain 1 Barrier.

name: Survival Instinct
description: The first time you lose health in each combat, gain 50% Damage Amplification. If your health is below 50%, gain 100% Damage Amplification instead.

name: Versatile Stance
description:
Gain 1 Regeneration and 1 Enrage permanently.
Whenever you dodge, trigger Regeneration and Enrage.

name: Upgraded Formula
description: After using a potion, restore 30% of your health.

name: Makeshift Weapons
description: After trashing an item while in combat, gain 15% Damage amplification.

name: Attack Pattern
description: Enemies that have already attacked you this combat deal 50% less damage.

name: Hexblade
description: When attacking, apply 20 Hex.

name: Weapon Proficiency
description: On-hit effects and when attacking effects trigger twice.

name: Thrill Addict
description: Critical strikes deal double damage, but non-critical strikes deal half damage.

name: Nimble Fighter
description: 50% Swiftness, 100% Counterattack and 25% Dodge if the Head slot is empty.

name: Duelist
description: At the start of the round, if you have a Hand slot empty, gain 3 extra attacks.

name: Timely Retreat
description: When an enemy damages you, gain 1 Barrier and 5 Weakness.

name: Untouchable
description: Whenever an enemy attacks you and doesn't deal damage, apply 20 Wound to it.

name: Target the Weak
description: The first time you attack each enemy in each round, if it suffers a negative Status, gain an extra attack.

name: Genius of Adaptability
description:
Gain a stat buff depending on the item on your right hand:
Physical weapon - 20 Physical damage.
Magic weapon - 80% Mana Burst.
Shield - 4 Guard.

name: Schrödinger's Cat
description: ALL characters receive double damage. You gain Invulnerable every 2nd turn.

name: Slow Start
description: Gain 1 extra attack for each round that has passed, but your attacks deal 50% less damage.

name: Vampirism
description: Gain 15% Lifesteal permanently that increases to 30% during the first round of each combat.

name: Perfectly Balanced
description:
Whenever you lose armor, restore 3 health.
Whenever you lose health, gain 3 Rage.
Whenever you lose stacks of a Status, gain 3 armor.

name: Rule of Three
description: At the end of the 3rd round, lose all your Damage Amplification and deal magic damage equal to 3 times that amount to all enemies.

name: Basic Training
description: Gain 5 Armor and 10% Damage amplification.

name: Healthy Lifestyle
description: Gain 30 Max Health and restore 30 health.

name: Quick Repair
description: When obtaining an item, 25% chance to upgrade it automatically.

name: Handcrafted Traps
description: When entering a new Area, all enemies receive physical damage equal to 5 + 5% of their Max Health.

name: Emotional
description: When entering a new Area, gain 8 Rage.

name: Piercing Gaze
description: When entering a new Area, stun a random enemy.

name: Emergency Healing
description: The first time you lose health every round, restore 5 health.

name: Personal Collection
description: You have an extra 7% Damage Amplification for every different Rarity in your equipment.

name: Intimidate
description: When entering a new Area, apply 3 Weakness to all enemies.

name: Healing Factor
description: Gain 3 Regeneration, but lose it if your health is below 50%.

name: Poison Traps
description: When entering a new Area, apply 10 Poison to all enemies.

name: Executioner
description: After killing an enemy, gain an extra attack.

name: Adrenaline
description: Gain 40% Damage Amplification, but lose 8% Damage Amplification at the end of the round.

name: Diamond in the Rough
description: Upgrading Common, Uncommon, Rare and Epic items at level 1 now upgrades them directly to level 3.

name: Battle Frenzy
description: While you have 10 Rage or more, your attacks always critically strike.

name: Exploit Weakness
description: Poisoned enemies deal half damage and stunned enemies receive double damage.

name: Rough Skin
description: When an enemy attacks you, it receives physical damage equal to its damage + 3% of its Max Health.

name: Impervious
description: Whenever you lose 15 armor, gain 1 barrier.

name: Advanced Tactics
description: Enemies receive double damage from non-attack sources.

name: Creativity
description: For each different active Set, gain 8% Damage Amplification and 4 Armor.

name: Iron Will
description: Whenever you restore health, restore 1 extra point of health for every 5 missing points.

name: Reckless Strike
description: Counterattack now also triggers when you don't dodge.

name: Speciality
description: If you only have one active Set (excluding Mythics), gain a buff to your stats tailored to that Set.

name: Imposing Presence
description: At the end of the round, deal 3 magic damage to all enemies. Increases by 3 every turn.

name: Dual Wielding
description: If you have two weapons equipped, gain an extra attack at the start of every round.

name: Superior Quality
description: Equipped items at level 3 count double for Set activation.

name: Shieldmaster
description: If you have a shield equipped, add your base Armor to your physical damage when attacking.

name: Wild Warrior
description: Your Rage and Poison no longer lose stacks.

name: Chaotic Violence
description: Gain 150% Damage Amplification, but the target of your attacks is chosen randomly.

name: Life Force
description: When you restore health while being at full health, gain temporary armor equal to the health that you would have restored. Gain 2 Regeneration.

name: Protagonist
description: Gain 80 Armor. Enemies attack an additional time.

name: War of Attrition
description: When entering a new Area and at the end of the round, apply 3 Weak and 3 Wound to all enemies.

name: One Dog Army
description: When you attack an enemy that hasn't yet been attacked this combat, gain 1 Barrier, 25% Damage amplification and restore 5 health.

name: Eternal Blessing
description: Whenever you lose 30 health, gain Barriers equal to your Guard.

name: Bloodlust
description: While you are at full health, all your damage is doubled. Gain 5% Lifesteal.

name: Overwhelming Strength
description: Attacks and Mana Burst triggers deal triple damage, but you gain 5 Wounds after attacking and can't gain extra attacks.

name: Blood Sacrifice
description: When entering a new Area, lose 1 health and gain 30% Damage Amplification.

name: Tempting Offer
description: When skipping chest rewards, restore 50% of your Max Health.

name: Futility
description: When entering a new Area, apply 5 Weakness to ALL characters.

name: Public Enemy
description: When entering a new Area, gain 4 armor for every enemy.

name: Pain
description: Gain 2 Wound and 20 Rage at the end of each round.

name: Destruction Magic
description: Your magic damage can critically strike. Gain 30% Critical Chance.

name: Shadow Guard
description: The first time you lose health each combat, gain 1 Barrier.

name: Rot
description: When attacking, apply five times the Poison you suffer. At the start of combat, gain 3 Poison.

name: Ceremonial Rite
description: At the end of the round, apply 5 Hex to all enemies.

name: Sudden Aging
description: When entering a new Area, a random enemy loses 20% of its Max Health and you restore 10% of your Max Health.

name: Hunger
description: When entering a new Area, gain an extra attack and 2 Weakness.

name: Cheat Death
description: The first time you were to die each round, gain Invulnerable and stay at 1 health.

name: Corrupted Soul
description: While suffering any negative Status, all damage received is reduced by 30%.

name: Grow in Power
description: Gain 2 Regeneration. At the end of the round, gain 10% Damage Amplification.

name: Impervious Warding
description: Your Barriers have a 20% chance of not breaking when hit.

name: Curse Magic
description: Mana Burst triggers apply on-hit effects. Gain 2 Magic damage.

name: Living in Solitude
description: Gain an extra attack when fighting lone enemies.

name: Soul Leech
description: After killing an enemy, restore 5 health.

name: Decaying Touch
description:
Your attacks always deal 1 physical damage. The rest of the damage you would've dealt is applied as Poison.
Gain 10 Physical Damage.

name: Shared Fate
description: Whenever you lose stacks of a Status in combat, a random enemy gains the same amount of Wound stacks.

name: Shadow Veil
description: At the end of each round, if you don't have armor, gain 10 armor.

name: War Magic
description: Now Mana Burst deals damage to all enemies.

name: Soul Eater
description: After killing an enemy, gain 25% Damage Amplification.

name: Ethereal Form
description: Every 3rd turn, become Invulnerable,

name: Absolute Power
description: The damage increase from Damage Amplification is doubled.

name: Solve
description: If every item you have equipped is from a different Category, ALL your stats are buffed.

name: Corruption's Call
description: When entering a new Area, gain 2 stacks of Poison, Weakness and Wound. Then apply 10 stacks of each to all enemies and stun them.

name: Inevitable End
description: At the end of the round, if you didn't lose health, all enemies lose 10% of their Max Health.

name: Towards Eternity
description:
Gain 20 Max Health and restore 20 health.
After receiving damage, if you have armor left, gain 3 Regeneration.

name: Fear of Death
description: Enemies below 50% of their life receive triple damage.

name: Dark Matter
description: While you have armor, enemies deal 10% less damage and can't apply Statuses.

name: Coagula
description: If the three items equipped in your Armor Slots share Category (for example, Headpiece), gain 30 Armor. If both items equipped in your Hand Slots share Category, gain 25% Damage Amplification and 1 Guard. If both items equipped in your Decoration Slots share Category, gain 5 Regeneration.

name: No Escape
description: Enemies suffering from a negative Status have a 50% chance of gaining stacks instead of losing them.

name: Dark Energy
description: While you don't have armor, all your damage is doubled and you apply 2 extra stacks when applying Statuses.

name: Ascended Soul
description: At the end of the 3rd round, gain 10 Regeneration, 100% Damage Amplification and Invulnerable.

name: Trinitas
description: At the start of each round, if you have exactly three stacks of any Status, gain 3 extra attacks.
